name: RPlog_The_Vichten_Estate
title: The Audacity of the Sith
summary: Darth Malign pays a house call to the Caspian estate of the smuggler-magnate Axel Vichten, where Vichten tours his grounds by repulsor cart amid landscapers and technicians, attended by his associates Dareus and the Twi'lek Tal'sin. The Sith proposes a campaign of terror -- ten thousand credits per high-profile landmark destroyed in neutral space, each attack to be claimed by a fabricated organization to spread fear. Vichten haggles over targets and reasoning, steering the scheme toward bringing down the Maffi syndicate and Black Sun, while refusing any attack on his beloved Caspar and declaring he wants something more useful than credits. Malign probes Vichten's grief over his dead wife Eyrie, naming him a liar and a man with the audacity of a Sith, then departs giving him twenty-four hours to name his price in a handwritten letter. Vichten, hating yet envying Malign, writes back in his own blood: what he wants is strength, and to be taught the ways of the Sith.
